3187400.name: Dollhouse
3187400.description:
Dollhouse is an extreme asymmetrical multiplayer horror experience that will make you shriek in fright. Scramble around in the dark as one of nine victims locked inside a house of horror. In the Dollhouse there is a fine line between predator and prey. Will you cower in the shadows, or hunt the weak? Only three people can escape the Dollhouse, so only the best can survive. Or play as one of three relentless killers and hunt your victims. Every game is a unique, terrifyingly deathmatch. Will you survive? NO, you will DIE!!!

One for All:

Dollhouse is a chaotic free-for-all deathmatch, a relentless struggle where no one is truly safe. Your objective: escape the labyrinthine Dollhouse. But only three players will taste freedom. Will you cower and hide or run from those that wish you harm? Or will you embrace the predator within, scavenge for weapons and ruthlessly cull the herd, ensuring your own survival at the expense of others? Do whatever it takes to claw your way to freedom, for only the most ruthless will survive.

Back from the Dead:

Every game someone will play as a spooky killer, out for blood. And when the first two victims die, they are transformed into hunters, their sole purpose to stalk and eliminate the remaining victims. However, the third player to fall will return as the cop, tasked with protecting the survivors from the relentless onslaught of the hunters. The balance of power shifts with every death, adding another layer of tension to the already chaotic struggle.

Darkness is you Ally:

The Dollhouse is shrouded in oppressive darkness, your only source of light is your handy torch. But wielding this light comes at a heavy price. Your torch is a double-edged sword, others stalk the darkness and the light will betray your position to lurking villains. Search diligently in the darkness for random weapons and items that spawn throughout the house each game. These are your only tools, your only means of survival and escape in this deadly game of cat and mouse.

Play your way:

Dollhouse has six premiere game modes. There is the classic asymmetrical horror experience, a gun game in the dark, close-quarters deathmatch!! Infected onslaught, the special imposters among us game mode and last but not least BATTLEROYALE!!!
3187400.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
